calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-09-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 12:35pm
Judge Pro Tem Glenn Lerner, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Paola Hira Hernandez present in pro per. Maria Zamudiu present as an interpreter for Appellant and interprets Spanish/English and English/Spanish. Witness Marcel Matley present on behalf of Appellant. Respondents, Fiorella Berrospi and Jorge Berrospi not present. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Glenn Lerner.
